title: Master Programs
content:
Master Programs

Application Requirements

Okan Homepage

Physiotherapy and Rehabilitation

Application Requirements and Required Documents

MENU

Application requirements to master program:

Having graduated from a 4-year universities in the Departments of  Physiotherapy and Rehabilitation

ALES score type numeric to get at least 55 points from relevant field,

Undergraduate grade point average is at least 2,

To be successful at interview,

* Note the overall success of the candidates is calculate by using 50% of the ALES score, 20% of undergraduate grade point average and 30% of note taken out of 100 at interview. The lower limit of the overall grade is determined each year by the Council of the Institute of Directors.

** Students who do not have ALES score may be admitted as a special student providing that equired points by entering the first ALES exam in a subsequent period.
